1.1 Disobey Task Specification: Did any agent not follow constraints? Task: determine smallest n such that S_n<0. They computed n>1103/7, ceiling gives 158. That's correct? Let's verify: t_n = 555 -7n. t1 = 548, t_n formula correct. Sum S_n = n/2 (t1 + t_n) = n/2 (548 + 555 -7n) = n/2 (1103 -7n). Need S_n<0 => n(1103-7n)<0 => since n>0, need 1103-7n<0 => n>1103/7 ≈157.571 => smallest integer 158. So correct. They obeyed spec. So no.

Thus all failures: no.
